sys_script_include.description:
Resolves the location hierarchy for a given location sys_id. Traverses the parent chain bottom-up and returns a structured object with one entry per hierarchy level (region, country, site, building, room).
Each entry contains sys_id, name, full_name, location_type, location_code and parent_sys_id. Levels not present in the chain are returned as "" (empty string).
Inactive nodes (life_cycle_stage != Operational or life_cycle_stage_status != In Use) are skipped during traversal.
Always returns a consistent object with all five keys. No CMDB or event knowledge — pure location utility.
sys_script_include.name: STLALocationHierarchyResolver
